clauses.heading: Retention and Attachment
clauses.text: The Reinsurer shall be liable for the amount of Ultimate Net Loss arising out of each Loss Occurrence in excess of the Retention of USD 5,000,000.

clauses.heading: Limit of Liability
clauses.text: The liability of the Reinsurer shall not exceed USD 10,000,000 in respect of any one Loss Occurrence.

clauses.heading: Reinstatement
clauses.text: In the event of exhaustion of the limit, one reinstatement shall be available at 100% additional premium, pro rata as to amount only, giving an aggregate limit of USD 20,000,000 for the period.

clauses.heading: Exclusions
clauses.text: This Contract does not cover loss or liability arising out of war, terrorism, or nuclear reaction, howsoever caused.

clauses.heading: Loss Notification and Bordereau
clauses.text: The Company shall advise the Reinsurer of any Loss Occurrence reaching 50% of the Retention within 30 days and shall provide a loss bordereau quarterly.
